scripts.dev:server:e2e: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm --dir ../apps/server exec tsx src/index.ts
scripts.dev:web:e2e: pnpm run build:apps:e2e && pnpm run start:web:e2e
scripts.start:server:e2e: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm --dir ../apps/server exec tsx src/index.ts
scripts.test: pnpm run build:apps:e2e && E2E_REUSE_BUILD=true playwright test
